Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Class PositionedString

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.PositionedString
Direct Known Subclasses:
PositionedIssueString, PositionedLabeledString
public class PositionedString extends Object
A string with associated position information (file and line number). The position information is used for error reporting.
